title: 异世界X异世界（Isekai x Isekai）
description:
Isekai x Isekai is a relaxing and heartwarming 2D idle desktop game.

 

It features a wide cast of adorable characters with distinct personalities. You can interact with them anytime, or simply watch their daily routines and cute behaviors for a cozy, comforting experience.

 

Characters will automatically generate Hearts over time. You can use these Hearts to pull in the gacha system for a chance to unlock rare, alternate forms of characters!

 

The game also includes two fun mini-games where you can play and earn additional characters and rewards.

 

Sit back, collect your favorite characters, and enjoy your charming isekai adventure! Your support would be greatly appreciated!Some dialogue content is only available in Chinese.
description_short: "Isekai × Isekai" is a casual 2D idle desktop game. Explore forests, journey into space, earn coins, collect new companions (including hidden characters), and build your own world.
